captions_untagged.explicit: My aunt has been diving so deep into her Buddhist practice lately, and I finally captured this quiet moment of her at the sanctuary. Her calm energy is honestly so inspiring to be around.
captions_untagged.moderate: Elaine always carries such a deeply grounded and peaceful energy with her. Loved the way the soft morning light caught her looking out over the courtyard.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Such a contemplative and peaceful expression in this shot. The way the natural light highlights the crisp layers of the dark and white fabric against the greenery is just beautifully serene.
